data.title: Zhongzhi Pharmaceutical Profit Slumps 82% as Revenue Falls and Dividend Is Scrapped
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Zhongzhi Pharmaceutical Holdings Limited ( (HK:3737) ).

Zhongzhi Pharmaceutical Holdings Limited reported a sharp downturn in its 2025 annual results, with revenue falling 21.6% year on year to RMB1.74 billion and gross profit dropping 26.6% to RMB945.9 million, compressing the group’s gross margin to 54.4% from 58.2%. Profit attributable to equity holders plunged 81.8% to RMB17.3 million, earnings per share slid to RMB0.02, and the board decided not to distribute a final dividend after paying HK5.00 cents per share the previous year.

The results show that while the company managed to reduce selling, distribution and administrative expenses, the fall in sales significantly eroded profitability and cash returns to shareholders. The suspension of dividends and steep earnings decline signal a more cautious capital allocation stance and underscore the operational pressures facing Zhongzhi in a more challenging pharmaceutical market environment, with implications for investor confidence and the firm’s ability to sustain past growth levels.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:3737) stock is a Buy with a HK$0.78 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Zhongzhi Pharmaceutical Holdings Limited stock, see the HK:3737 Stock Forecast page.

More about Zhongzhi Pharmaceutical Holdings Limited

Zhongzhi Pharmaceutical Holdings Limited is a Hong Kong-listed pharmaceutical group that develops, manufactures and sells traditional Chinese medicine and related pharmaceutical products. The company operates across the China healthcare market, focusing on prescription and over-the-counter remedies and leveraging its distribution network to reach hospitals, pharmacies and retail channels.

Average Trading Volume: 657,629

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: HK$719.9M

data.title: Shougang Fushan Tightens Audit Committee Mandate to Bolster Governance
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Shougang Fushan Resources Group Limited ( (HK:0639) ) has shared an announcement.

Shougang Fushan Resources Group Limited has formalised detailed terms of reference for its audit committee, defining its constitution, membership requirements, and operating procedures to strengthen corporate governance. The committee must be composed mainly of independent non-executive directors, be chaired by an independent director, meet at least twice a year, maintain a quorum of two members, and may seek information from employees and external professional advice as needed.

The framework also restricts recent partners of the company’s external auditor from serving on the committee for two years, and sets clear rules on written resolutions, alternates, and participation by phone to ensure effective oversight. The audit committee is specifically tasked with recommending the appointment, reappointment, remuneration and removal of the external auditor, and handling issues related to auditor resignation or dismissal, underscoring its central role in safeguarding audit independence and the integrity of the company’s financial reporting.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0639) stock is a Buy with a HK$3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Shougang Fushan Resources Group Limited stock, see the HK:0639 Stock Forecast page.

More about Shougang Fushan Resources Group Limited

Shougang Fushan Resources Group Limited operates in the resources sector and is governed by a board comprising executive and non-executive directors. The company follows Hong Kong corporate governance norms, using board committees such as the audit committee to oversee financial reporting, internal controls and auditor relationships on behalf of shareholders.

Average Trading Volume: 10,658,146

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$16.7B

data.title: Ocean Power Ships First PowerBuoy for Homeland Security
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Ocean Power Technologies ( (OPTT) ) has shared an update.

On March 24, 2026, Ocean Power Technologies announced it has shipped the first PowerBuoy® system under its previously disclosed $6.5 million contract with the U.S. Department of Homeland Security. The unit will support U.S. Coast Guard maritime domain awareness operations, marking the shift from system development and integration to operational deployment off the coast of California.

The initial shipment is a key milestone in OPT’s efforts to deliver autonomous, low-carbon offshore surveillance infrastructure for U.S. national security missions. By advancing integration with partner Anduril’s systems and preparing a broader PowerBuoy network for deployment, the contract strengthens OPT’s role in maritime security technology and underscores the commercial traction of its offshore monitoring solutions.

The most recent analyst rating on (OPTT) stock is a Buy with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ocean Power Technologies stock, see the OPTT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on OPTT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, OPTT is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (persistent losses, negative TTM gross profit, and ongoing cash burn). Technicals also reflect a downtrend and negative momentum. Offsetting these risks, the latest earnings call and recent updates point to improving commercial traction via record backlog/pipeline and major government awards, but execution and margin recovery remain key.

To see Spark’s full report on OPTT stock, click here.

More about Ocean Power Technologies

Ocean Power Technologies, Inc., based in Monroe Township, N.J., provides intelligent maritime solutions and services for the defense and security, oil and gas, science and research, and offshore wind markets. Its portfolio includes low-carbon PowerBuoy® platforms for remote power and data, Merrows™ maritime domain awareness integration, and WAM-V® autonomous surface vessels, supported by offices in New Jersey and California.

The company focuses on enabling safer, cleaner and more productive ocean operations through autonomous systems and marine robotics. By targeting mission-critical applications such as surveillance, monitoring and offshore infrastructure support, OPT positions itself as a technology partner for government agencies and industrial customers seeking persistent offshore capabilities.

An announcement from First Quantum Minerals ( (TSE:FM) ) is now available.

First Quantum Minerals will publish its first quarter 2026 financial and operating results on April 28, 2026, after the close of trading on the Toronto Stock Exchange, followed by a conference call and webcast with management on April 29 to discuss the performance. The scheduled disclosure will be closely watched by investors as the company navigates operational pauses at key assets such as Cobre Panamá and Ravensthorpe, while reallocating capital and attention to growth projects in Argentina and Peru, which could shape its long-term production profile and regional risk exposure.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:FM) stock is a Hold with a C$31.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on First Quantum Minerals stock, see the TSE:FM Stock Forecast page.

To see Spark’s full report on FM stock, click here.

More about First Quantum Minerals

First Quantum Minerals Ltd. is a Toronto-listed mining company focused on the production of copper, nickel and gold, alongside exploration and development activities. It operates mines in Zambia and Mauritania, while its Cobre Panamá mine has been placed into Preservation and Safe Management and its Ravensthorpe mine is under care and maintenance. The company is advancing the Taca Taca copper-gold-molybdenum project in Argentina and exploring the La Granja and Haquira copper deposits in Peru, underscoring its strategic focus on large-scale Latin American copper assets.

data.title: CStone’s 2025 Loss Widens as R&D Spend Climbs Ahead of Pralsetinib NRDL Boost
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

CStone Pharmaceuticals ( (HK:2616) ) has shared an announcement.

CStone Pharmaceuticals reported 2025 revenue of RMB269.6 million, down 33.8% year-on-year, as lower pralsetinib sales and reduced one-time license fees weighed on results while cost of revenue rose on inventory write-downs and early pralsetinib supply under a patient assistance program. The company’s net loss widened sharply to RMB437.0 million, driven by weaker gross profit and a near-doubling of R&D spending on pipeline assets such as CS2009 and CS5007, but management expects pralsetinib’s inclusion in China’s National Reimbursement Drug List from 2026 to support a revenue rebound despite the short-term hit in 2025.

Research and development expenses surged to RMB311.5 million in 2025, reflecting higher clinical and preclinical investment, even as selling and marketing costs fell on lower channel fees and staff expenses. CStone ended the year with RMB918.7 million in cash and time deposits, providing funding capacity to advance its oncology pipeline, though the enlarged operating loss underscores the execution risk and dependence on successful commercialization and broader reimbursement coverage for key products.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2616) stock is a Sell with a HK$5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CStone Pharmaceuticals stock, see the HK:2616 Stock Forecast page.

More about CStone Pharmaceuticals

CStone Pharmaceuticals, incorporated in the Cayman Islands and listed in Hong Kong, operates in the biopharmaceutical industry with a focus on oncology. Its primary products include cancer therapies such as avapritinib, pralsetinib and sugemalimab, with revenues derived from drug sales, licensing fees and royalties, particularly in the China market.

Average Trading Volume: 10,487,587

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$10.01B

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Mulsanne Group Holding Limited ( (HK:1817) ) is now available.

Mulsanne Group Holding Limited has disclosed the current composition of its board of directors, confirming one executive director who is also the chief executive officer, a chairman serving as a non-executive director, several additional non-executive directors, and three independent non-executive directors. The company has also detailed the makeup of its three key board committees, assigning independent non-executive directors to chair the audit and remuneration committees and the non-executive chairman to lead the nomination committee, underlining an emphasis on independent oversight and formalized governance practices.

These committee assignments indicate that independent directors play a central role in supervising financial reporting and executive pay, while the board chairman oversees director nominations and succession matters. For shareholders and other stakeholders, the clarified structure provides greater transparency into how oversight responsibilities are distributed across the board, which may help bolster confidence in the company’s governance and decision-making processes.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1817) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.29 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mulsanne Group Holding Limited stock, see the HK:1817 Stock Forecast page.

More about Mulsanne Group Holding Limited

Mulsanne Group Holding Limited is a Cayman Islands-incorporated company listed in Hong Kong under stock code 1817. It is governed by a board comprising an executive director who serves as chief executive officer, non-executive directors, and independent non-executive directors, reflecting a typical Hong Kong-listed corporate governance structure.

data.title: Microbot Medical Showcases Landmark Robotic Endovascular Procedures
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Microbot Medical ( (MBOT) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 26, 2026, Emory Healthcare and Microbot Medical announced that Emory interventional radiologists successfully performed robotic peripheral endovascular procedures using Microbot’s LIBERTY Endovascular Robotic System. The cases included the world’s first robotic prostatic artery embolization for benign prostatic hyperplasia and the first robotic Y-90 radioembolization mapping for liver cancer, demonstrating the system’s use across multiple complex indications.

Clinicians reported that LIBERTY improved navigation in challenging anatomy and enabled more precise, personalized treatment delivery, while aiming to reduce radiation exposure and physical strain and improve procedural efficiency. The milestone follows the limited market release of LIBERTY in November 2025 and precedes its planned full market launch in April 2026, underscoring growing clinical adoption that could strengthen Microbot’s position in the endovascular robotics market and expand patient access to minimally invasive care.

The most recent analyst rating on (MBOT) stock is a Buy with a $12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Microbot Medical stock, see the MBOT Stock Forecast page.

More about Microbot Medical

Microbot Medical Inc. is a commercial-stage medical device company specializing in advanced robotic technology for endovascular procedures. Its flagship product, the LIBERTY Endovascular Robotic System, is the world’s first FDA-cleared, single-use, remotely operated robotic solution for peripheral endovascular interventions, targeting greater precision, efficiency and safety in vascular care.

Average Trading Volume: 1,959,153

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $169.9M

Beit-On highlighted Similarweb’s extensive digital data asset as a critical resource for customers worldwide and underscored his intention to help drive long-term shareholder value. BioHarvest Sciences ( (BHST) ) has issued an announcement.

BioHarvest Sciences has announced that its VINIA brand is now the top-selling resveratrol polyphenol nutraceutical in the U.S., less than five years after entering the market. The product’s position is underpinned by clinically demonstrated benefits in increasing arterial dilation and improving blood flow, as well as a subscription-driven model that has built a strong e-commerce presence.

The company reported more than $30 million in VINIA U.S. revenue for 2025 and about $85 million in cumulative global sales, supported by over 85,000 active users. Management and medical advisors say VINIA’s performance and its plant-cell delivery system validate BioHarvest’s Botanical Synthesis technology, which concentrates piceid resveratrol up to 100 times natural grape levels and is expected to serve as a platform for additional synergistic nutraceutical products.

The most recent analyst rating on (BHST) stock is a Buy with a $10.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BioHarvest Sciences stock, see the BHST Stock Forecast page.

To see Spark’s full report on BHST stock, click here.

BioHarvest Sciences Inc. is a biotechnology company that develops plant-based nutraceuticals using its proprietary Botanical Synthesis platform. Its flagship product, VINIA, is a red grape-derived resveratrol polyphenol supplement focused on cardiovascular and vascular health, sold primarily via a direct-to-consumer e-commerce model in the U.S. and Israel.

data.title: Mustang Maps Major Geophysical Target at Nevada Copper-Gold Project
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Mustang Minerals ( (TSE:MMX) ) just unveiled an update.

Mustang Minerals has confirmed and expanded a large induced polarization geophysical anomaly at its Pilot copper-gold project in central Nevada, identifying a 1.25 by up to 2.2 kilometre chargeability high that remains open. The anomaly coincides with a magnetic high and broad zones of elevated copper, gold, bismuth and molybdenum in soils, supporting the presence of a large hydrothermal alteration system linked to potential porphyry-style mineralisation.

Recent work at Pilot included additional IP lines and soil sampling to better define the limits of the anomaly ahead of a potential first-pass drill program, for which a permit is already in place. Mustang has also extended IP lines at its Red Ring project and completed logistical preparations at Confusion Hills for a possible 2026 drill campaign, underscoring a broader push to systematically advance its Nevada copper-gold exploration portfolio.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:MMX) stock is a Hold with a C$0.07 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mustang Minerals stock, see the TSE:MMX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MMX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MMX is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and persistent cash burn). Technicals provide some support due to strength versus moving averages and a positive MACD, but overbought readings increase short-term risk. Valuation is difficult to justify on earnings given a negative P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on MMX stock, click here.

More about Mustang Minerals

Mustang Minerals Limited is a Vancouver-based mineral exploration company focused on copper and gold projects in central Nevada. Its portfolio includes the Pilot porphyry copper-gold prospect and the Red Ring and Confusion Hills high-sulphidation gold-silver-copper targets, all considered prospective for large hydrothermal and porphyry-style mineral systems.

The company is advancing these early-stage assets through geophysical surveys, soil sampling and logistical preparations for drilling, aiming to delineate significant copper-gold mineralisation. Mustang’s Nevada projects position it in a competitive North American copper and gold exploration corridor at a time of strong interest in critical and precious metals.

Average Trading Volume: 49,181

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$5.54M
